name: Stocks
description: Ownership shares in publicly traded companies that can be bought and sold on stock exchanges, offering potential for capital appreciation and dividends.
advantages: Highest potential returns among major asset classes
Ownership stake in companies with voting rights
Dividend income in addition to capital gains
High liquidity - can be sold quickly during market hours
disadvantages: Transaction costs and taxes on gains
examples: Mid-cap stocks (growing companies with moderate risk)
Small-cap stocks (smaller companies with higher growth potential)
